speaker: Argo
text: Should I invite Professor Celio...? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: This is our first time taking a bath together, isn't it? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: That’s right.

speaker: Celio
text: Professor Derich often bathes with students, but I rarely receive invitations myself…

speaker: Argo
text: (He certainly seems hard to approach…)

speaker: Celio
text: That’s why I’m glad you asked me to come along today. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Actually, I should be thanking you for coming. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "I... I don't know what to say." *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: ... What?

speaker: Argo
text: Oh. I just thought you were going to take your gloves off. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Haven't I told you? I have burns and would rather not show them. *

speaker: Argo
text: (He still won't admit he has a tattoo even though I told him I saw it…)

speaker: Argo
text: (...Oh well. I won't keep haunting him...) *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: How have things been going at the college recently? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Hmm... I can’t say it's been great…

speaker: Celio
text: Why? Are you having trouble keeping up with lectures? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: No, I just keep being reminded that I’m out of my league and having a hard time getting along with the Harshreich students.

speaker: Celio
text: Ah... So that’s it. Don't worry, this happens every year. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What? It does?

speaker: Celio
text: You’re students from different countries. It’s only natural that you won’t get along right away. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: But I’m sure you’ll all be friends by the end of the year. Don't worry.

speaker: Argo
text: (One year...)
